---
image: 1.JPG
title: ""
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 18em
  image-shape: round
css: styles.css
---

I'm an Assistant Professor in the Department of Economics at the [University of Oklahoma](https://www.ou.edu/cas/economics).

My research focuses on international trade, spatial economics, and development economics. I received my PhD from Yale University in 2024.

[CV](Huynh_Nghiem_CV.pdf){target="_blank"} | [nqh@ou.edu](mailto:nqh@ou.edu) | [Name pronunciation](https://hearmyname.net/say/vi-vn/Nghi%C3%AAm%20Hu%E1%BB%B3nh){target="_blank"}
